task_completion.description: Verify that the Ardour session is open and the audio evidence is loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ardour application window is visible with an audio track displayed in the timeline.

task_completion.description: Verify that the audio track has been renamed according to the intake form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The track header on the left side of the Ardour timeline shows the name 'Exhibit A - Case 2024-CR-0847'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the audio track has been divided into 5 segments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The audio waveform in the timeline is split into 5 distinct regions, or 5 distinct export ranges/markers are defined on the timeline ruler.

task_completion.description: Verify that the segments or ranges are named correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The regions in the timeline or the export ranges are named 'segment_01_background', 'segment_02_speaker1_defendant', 'segment_03_crosstalk', 'segment_04_speaker2_complainant', and 'segment_05_ambient_tail'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the deliverables have been exported to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows the 5 expected '.wav' files located in the '/home/ga/Audio/evidence_output/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ardour GUI to perform the audio editing and export.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Ardour interface (e.g., splitting regions, renaming tracks, export dialog) rather than relying solely on terminal commands like ffmpeg.

integrity.description: The exported files are genuine audio files and not empty dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file sizes in the file manager or terminal are greater than zero, or the Ardour export dialog is seen actively processing the files.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the intake form to get the instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is seen displaying the contents of the intake form located at /home/ga/Audio/evidence_intake/.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The track label must be 'Exhibit A - Case 2024-CR-0847'. The audio must be segmented into exactly 5 parts with the following names: 'segment_01_background.wav', 'segment_02_speaker1_defendant.wav', 'segment_03_crosstalk.wav', 'segment_04_speaker2_complainant.wav', and 'segment_05_ambient_tail.wav'. The final exported files must be located in '/home/ga/Audio/evidence_output/'.
